meta.title: Herb London on the Massachusetts Senatorial Election
meta.description: Hudson President Herb London discusses the aftermath of the Massachusetts senatorial election. What does this result mean for the future of the the health care plan? Is the election of Brown a result of general discontent with the Democratic party nationwide?
